Champions: Love Bomb: Deal magic damage to the current target and less damage to adjacent enemies.
Ace in the Hole: Fire a long-range shot at the farthest enemy, dealing physical damage to the first enemy hit.
Eruption: Gain a Shield and breathe a cone of fire that Burns and Wounds enemies hit.
Decimate: Deal magic damage to adjacent enemies; for a few seconds after, attacks deal bonus magic damage.
Courage: Gain a Shield; Garen's next attack deals bonus damage.
Counter-Strike: Gain Armor/MR briefly, then deal magic damage to adjacent enemies and Stun the current target.
Leap!: Leap to the lowest-Health enemy within range, dealing bonus physical damage.
Money Dance: Passively gain permanent Health from gold collected; actively heal and empower the next attack with bonus magic damage.
Raining Artillery: Deal magic damage to the lowest-Health enemy in range; gains attack range periodically.
Topaz Skin: Gain Armor and deal magic damage in a cone to enemies.
Uproot: Gain Armor/MR; every third cast also deals physical damage to adjacent enemies and heals Rek'Sai.
On the Hunt: Gain bonus Attack Damage and grant Attack Speed to self and adjacent allies.
Steel Tempest: Gain a Shield and deal magic damage to the current target; attacks while shielded deal bonus magic damage.
Shred the current target's Magic Resist and deal magic damage to them. Heal for a portion of the damage dealt.
Boulder Toss: Passively gain AD from attacking/being hit; actively fling a boulder dealing physical damage in a line.
Heavenly Winds: Shield Janna and the lowest-Health ally, then deal magic damage to the two nearest enemies.
Flourish of Arrows: Dash away from the target, dealing magic damage to them and the nearest enemy.
Bunny Binding: Throw a bouncing projectile toward the farthest enemy, dealing magic damage along the way and Stunning the first two hit.
Hop Blossom: Hop up gaining damage reduction and healing, then slam down dealing magic damage to adjacent enemies.
Supreme Display of Talent: Empowered attacks deal bonus physical damage to the target and enemies behind them while dashing for better angles.
Broken Wings: Deal physical damage to the current target; every third cast also hits adjacent enemies and heals Riven.
Absolution: Fire a piercing shot beyond the target dealing physical damage, granting AD to Senna and nearby allies.
Spirit's Refuge: Reduce damage taken for Shen and adjacent allies; Shen's next attacks deal bonus true damage.
Dim-Sum Delivery: Throw a poisoned dumpling at an enemy, dealing magic damage over time.
Dark Despoil: Sap power from the two nearest enemies, gaining maximum Health and dealing magic damage to them over time.
Paper Thorns: Summon two Vine Lashers that attack the nearest enemy, dealing magic damage and Wounding their targets.
Lunar Barrage: Rain meteors on the enemy row with the most health, dealing magic damage split among them, plus damage to the current target. Enemies hit are Shredded.
Herbal Tea-rs: Heal nearby allies over time while dealing magic damage to enemies caught in the tears.
Duskwave: Sunder the nearest enemies, then fire three shots dealing physical damage to each.
Passive: attacks fling Meeps that deal bonus magic damage to the target.
Purification Rites: Heal and create a sacred zone that reduces damage from outside it; while active, Diana's attacks deal bonus magic damage.
Prophet of Spirits: Gain a Shield and summon a Tentacle that slams nearby enemies for magic damage, healing Illaoi.
Divine Judgement: Passively gain AP as the team loses Health; actively Mana Reave a group of enemies and deal magic damage to them.
Tongue Lash: Gain a Shield and deal magic damage to the current target, dealing more if Tahm Kench has more Health than the target.
Guided Passage: Shield Thresh and the lowest-Health ally, damaging adjacent enemies and sharing Armor/MR with the shielded ally.
Firecracker Frenzy: Gain bonus Attack Damage, then jump on the lowest-Health enemy in range dealing physical damage to adjacent enemies before repositioning.
Ink Smash: Empower the next three attacks, healing and Stunning on the first two, then a larger hit on the third.
Fate Sealed: Dash through the furthest enemy in spirit form, dealing physical damage and Wounding enemies along the way while gaining a Shield and Attack Speed.
Calculated: Fire a missile dealing magic damage to the current target that ricochets to a nearby enemy for reduced damage; kills add ricochets.
Get'em, Tibbers!: Mount Tibbers, gaining bonus Health and Stunning nearby enemies, then Burn and Wound enemies in range.
Rain of Shards: Fire a volley of arrows split between the current target and the closest enemies, dealing physical damage per arrow.
Savior's Protection: Taunt nearby enemies while gaining Armor/MR and becoming unstoppable, then deal magic damage and shield allies in range.
Inkstorm: Fire a rapid volley of missiles at the target, dealing bonus physical damage after repeated hits.
Shadow Assassin: Transform, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies and gaining Critical Strike Chance; later casts deal damage through the target in a line.
Dragon's Dance: Kick the target, dealing physical damage, Mana Reaving and Stunning them; enemies in the path take damage and are knocked toward a shield.
Eep!: Send a rolling orb that deals magic damage to enemies hit, with periodic empowered mega-orbs; heals Lillia on cast.
The Tempest's Torment: Send an expanding blizzard at the largest clump of enemies, dealing magic damage over time and Chilling them.
Depth Charge: Send shockwaves toward the most enemies in a line, dealing magic damage and Stunning all hit.
Forge of the Forest: Gain a Shield, then channel damage to adjacent enemies over time before tossing a completed item to the nearest ally.
Unchain the Demon: Dash around the target dealing magic damage and healing, then swipe nearby enemies for magic damage.
Phantom Butterflies: Begin combat with butterflies that gain stacks over time; deals magic damage to the current target, dealing more damage with more butterflies.
Summon a Sand Soldier to attack the current target, dealing magic damage; empowered periodically.
A Brush with Fate: Create a pool of paint that heals allies over time, then explodes to heal allies and deal magic damage to enemies.
Blade Dance: Attacks periodically send blades that Sunder enemies; active sends blades at the lowest-Health enemies.
Let'em Brew: Dunk the target into a teapot, Stunning and dealing magic damage over time, then throw the teapot at a group of enemies.
Grand Entrance: Dash into the largest group of enemies, dealing magic damage and gaining a Shield per enemy hit, reducing their damage.
Light and Shadow: Passively gain permanent AD from squatting adjacent units; actively slam the target, Stunning and dealing physical damage plus bonus damage based on their max Health.
Ram Slam / Tiger Strikes: Gain a Shield and knock up enemies while charging, then slam the nearest enemy; after dropping below half Health, transforms to gain Attack Speed and empowered attacks.
Legendary Prowess: Cycles through three empowered strikes: a Stunning throw, a spin, and a dash slam, each dealing physical damage.
Dynamic Duo: Fires feathers at the nearest enemies, dealing physical damage; paired with Rakan through the Lovers trait.
Origins: After 8 seconds of combat, the Dragon strikes the board, dealing true damage to enemies and granting all allies Attack Speed for the rest of combat.    • (2): 5% Health damage, 12% AS    • (3): 10% Health damage, 18% AS    • (4): 10% Health damage, 18% AS, Stuns for 1.5s    • (5): 25% Health damage, 40% AS

Dryads gain Ability Power and 150 Health. Each enemy death grants permanent additional Health.    • (2): +15 AP; 3 HP per enemy death    • (4): +30 AP; 7 HP per enemy death    • (6): +55 AP; 10 HP per enemy death

Hover one Fated unit over another to form a pair and unlock a Fated Bonus. Your pair gains 20% Health.    • (3): Pair gets the Fated Bonus    • (5): All Fated units get 200% of the Fated Bonus    • (7): All Fated units get 300% of the Fated Bonus    • (10): All Fated units get 300% of EVERY Fated Bonus

When you lose a fight, gain Luck (lose it when you win).    • (3): Roll a die; that many player combats until a Festival where Luck converts to rewards    • (5): Heal 2 player health at the start of each player combat    • (7): Fortune smiles! Extra rewards and more luck every turn, Festival every turn

Upon dealing or taking damage 5 times, Ghostly units send 2 spectres to haunt nearby enemies and heal 2% max Health every 2 seconds. Haunted enemies take bonus damage per spectre and pass spectres on death.    • (2): 5% per spectre    • (4): 10% per spectre    • (6): 16% per spectre    • (8): 36% per spectre

Heavenly units grant unique stats to your team, increased by each Heavenly unit in play; Heavenly units themselves gain 70% more.    • (2): 100% bonus    • (3): 110% bonus    • (4): 125% bonus    • (5): 145% bonus    • (6): 170% bonus    • (7): 200% bonus

Gain unique Inkshadow items (change each game). Inkshadow champions gain bonus damage and damage reduction.    • (3): 1 item, 5% bonus damage/DR    • (5): 2 items, 16% more bonus damage/DR    • (7): 4 items, 22% more bonus damage/DR
(Unique) Rakan & Xayah are the same Lover unit. The fielded Lover depends on front/back placement; the other provides a bonus effect. Front: Trickshot Xayah. Back: Altruist Rakan.

Mythic champions gain Health, Ability Power, and Attack Damage. After 4 player combats they become Epic, increasing the bonus by 50%.    • (3): +8% HP, 11% AP/AD    • (5): +18% HP, 22% AP/AD    • (7): +25% HP, 35% AP/AD    • (10): Instantly Epic, bonus +250%

After casting, Porcelain champions boil, gaining Attack Speed and taking less damage for 4 seconds.    • (2): +30% AS, 20% reduced damage    • (4): +55% AS, 33% reduced damage    • (6): +100% AS, 50% reduced damage

Storyweavers summon and evolve a Hero (Kayle), gaining max Health at each breakpoint; Kayle's HP/AP scale with Storyweaver star level, and she gains Attack Speed per Stage.    • (3): Pick a supportive effect; +60 HP    • (5): Pick a combat effect; +100 HP    • (7): Pick a combat effect; +150 HP    • (10): Ascend; +250 HP

The moon illuminates hexes, Shielding units placed there at combat start. Umbral units in illuminated hexes execute low-Health enemies.    • (2): 200 Shield, 10% execute    • (4): 450 Shield, 18% execute, more hexes illuminated    • (6): 900 Shield, 25% execute, whole board illuminated    • (9): 100% loot chance on execute, 60% execute
Classes: Altruists heal the lowest-Health ally for 15% of the damage they deal. Your team gains Armor and Magic Resist.    • (2): +10 Armor/MR    • (3): +25 Armor/MR    • (4): +40 Armor/MR

Arcanists gain Ability Power and grant Ability Power to allies.    • (2): +20 AP to all allies    • (4): +45 AP for Arcanists, +20 for others    • (6): +80 AP for Arcanists, +40 for others    • (8): +125 AP for Arcanists, +125 for others
(Unique) The Artist paints the champion placed in a special bench slot, granting a 1-star copy when complete. Rounds needed to complete = unit cost.

Behemoths gain increased Armor and Magic Resist. When a Behemoth dies, the nearest Behemoth ally gains 50% more for a few seconds.    • (2): +25 Armor/MR    • (4): +55 Armor/MR    • (6): +85 Armor/MR    • (8): +115 Armor/MR

Your team gains 100 flat max Health. Bruisers gain additional max Health.    • (2): +20% max HP    • (4): +40% max HP    • (6): +60-65% max HP    • (8): +75-80% max HP, periodic bonus physical damage on next attack

Duelist units gain Attack Speed per attack, stacking up to 12 times; at higher breakpoints Duelists also take less damage.    • (2): +5% AS per stack    • (4): +9% AS per stack    • (6): +13% AS per stack, 12% less damage taken    • (8): +18% AS per stack, 18% less damage taken

(Varies each game) Your team gains bonus damage, more based on Level. After combat, XP is stored in a Soul Core; sell it to claim the XP.    • (3): 1% damage per Level, 1 XP    • (5): 3% damage per Level, 2 XP
(Unique) Every 3 casts, Wukong's staff grows, modifying his Abilities.
Every 3 seconds, your units gain Mana.    • (2): +5 Mana to all allies    • (4): +20 Mana to Invokers, +5 to others    • (6): +35 Mana to Invokers, +15 to others
Reapers' Abilities can Critically Strike.    • (2): +25% Critical Strike Chance    • (4): Additionally, Reapers' hits Bleed enemies for bonus true damage over time

Combat start: allies in the front 2 rows gain Omnivamp; allies in the back 2 rows gain Ability Power.    • (2): +11% Omnivamp or +15 AP    • (3): +18% Omnivamp or +30 AP    • (4): +30% Omnivamp or +45 AP    • (5): +44% Omnivamp or +75 AP
Innate: +1 Attack Range. Snipers deal more damage to farther targets.    • (2): 7-8% damage per hex    • (4): 15-18% damage per hex    • (6): 30-35% damage per hex, +2 additional Attack Range
(Unique) The first time Udyr drops below 50% Health, he heals to full, gains movement speed, and his Ability changes from Ram Slam to Tiger Strikes.

All Abilities of Trickshot units ricochet, each bounce dealing a percentage of the previous hit's damage.    • (2): 1 ricochet at 40% of previous damage    • (4): 2 ricochets at 60% of previous damage
Warden units gain damage reduction, with an additional bonus for the first 10 seconds of combat.    • (2): 10% damage reduction    • (4): 20% damage reduction    • (6): 33% damage reduction
